title: Copy email or link
excerpt: I think having the option to copy either a link column value or an email would be really helpful. The Item ID column has this option (you just click on the number and it is copied for you) and the same thing would be ama…

posts.author: Tara-Horn (Tara Horn)
posts.cookedHtml: I think having the option to copy either a link column value or an email would be really helpful. The Item ID column has this option (you just click on the number and it is copied for you) and the same thing would be amazing on the link and email column. I find that I constantly need to share that info and it is hard to copy it.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
For me, email when I right click and copy cell - it copies both the name and email as a line. So that works fine (mostly)

Link on the other hand does have an issue because if the link has link text then it only copies the link text and not the actual link.
